payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: White rectangular picture frame with a light-blue mat showing a seaside/umbrella print; the framed print is partially edge-cropped in the upper-left of the crop and is partly occluded by a foreground wooden stair banister; frame appears intact and wall-mounted, approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.
